flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at CET-San Jose fell 63% between 2009 and 2010 (87.5% → 32.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at CET-San Jose vs the 2004–2008 baseline (78.7% vs 85.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at CET-San Jose rose 121% between 2007 and 2010 (321 → 711).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at CET-San Jose fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).
